about.title: About SJK(T) Connect
about.pageDescription: Learn about SJK(T) Connect, the intelligence platform for Malaysia's 528 Tamil schools.
about.subtitle: The first intelligence platform dedicated to Malaysia's Tamil schools
about.whatWeDoP1: SJK(T) Connect is an open data platform that tracks, connects, and amplifies the voices of Malaysia's 528 Tamil primary schools. We monitor parliamentary proceedings, media coverage, and community developments — so that no Tamil school goes unnoticed.
about.whatWeDoP2: Built by Tamil Foundation Malaysia, this platform serves school leaders, parents, elected representatives, journalists, and community advocates who care about Tamil education.
about.featureParliamentDesc: AI-powered analysis of Hansard proceedings. We track every mention of Tamil schools in Parliament and score MPs on their engagement.
about.featureNewsDesc: Daily media monitoring with AI-powered relevance scoring. Stay informed about developments affecting Tamil schools.
about.featureDirectoryDesc: Comprehensive data on all 528 schools — enrolment, leadership, location, and constituency representation.
about.aboutTFBody: Tamil Foundation Malaysia is a non-profit organisation dedicated to preserving and advancing Tamil language, education, and culture in Malaysia. SJK(T) Connect is one of our flagship digital initiatives.
about.dataSourceBody: School data from the Ministry of Education (January 2026). Parliamentary data from the Parliament of Malaysia. Constituency data from the Election Commission of Malaysia.

parliamentWatch.monitoringBody: Parliament Watch is actively monitoring Hansard proceedings. Subscribe to receive analysis as new sitting data is processed.
parliamentWatch.exploreBody: MP scorecards and constituency data are available now. Visit constituency pages to see school data and MP information for each area.
parliamentWatch.historyIntro: Every Tamil school has a story worth telling. Help us preserve it.
parliamentWatch.historyBody: If you have information about this school's history — founding year, key milestones, notable alumni — we'd love to hear from you.
parliamentWatch.noPhoto: No photo available. Know this school? Help us by sharing a photo.
parliamentWatch.meetingReportsDesc: Executive policy briefings synthesising all sittings from each parliamentary meeting period.
parliamentWatch.sittingBriefsDesc: Comprehensive reports from each parliamentary sitting where Tamil schools were discussed.
parliamentWatch.intelligenceReportsDesc: Policy briefings synthesising Tamil school discussions from each parliamentary meeting.
parliamentWatch.stayInformedBody: Get parliamentary intelligence on Tamil school discussions delivered to your inbox.

legal.privacyIntroBody: SJK(T) Connect is operated by Tamil Foundation Malaysia. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.
legal.dataWeCollectBody: School data: We collect and display publicly available data from the Ministry of Education, including school names, enrolment figures, teacher counts, GPS coordinates, and administrative details. Subscriber data: When you subscribe to Intelligence Blast, we collect your name, email address, and optional organisation. Contact forms: When you contact us, we collect your name, email, and message. Claim verification: When school representatives claim their page, we collect their MOE email address for verification.
legal.howWeUseBody: We use your data to: display school information on the platform, send you intelligence digests and alerts you have subscribed to, verify school representatives, respond to your enquiries, and improve our platform. We do not sell your data to third parties.
legal.thirdPartyBody: We use the following third-party services: Google Maps (to display school locations and maps), Brevo (to send transactional emails and newsletters), and Google Cloud Platform (to host our platform). Each service has its own privacy policy governing how they handle data.
legal.yourRightsBody: You can unsubscribe from our emails at any time using the link in any email. You can request deletion of your subscriber data by contacting us. School data sourced from the Ministry of Education is public information.
legal.contactUsBody: For privacy-related enquiries, please contact us at info@tamilfoundation.org.
legal.termsAcceptanceBody: By accessing and using SJK(T) Connect (tamilschool.org), you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
legal.termsPurposeBody: SJK(T) Connect is a public data and advocacy platform for Malaysia's Tamil primary schools. We aggregate publicly available data from the Ministry of Education, Parliament of Malaysia, and other official sources to promote transparency and accountability in Tamil education.
legal.termsDataBody: School data is sourced from the Ministry of Education and is updated periodically. While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee that all information is current or error-free. Parliamentary data is derived from official Hansard proceedings. If you believe any data is incorrect, please contact us.
legal.termsUserBody: School representatives who claim their page are responsible for the accuracy of any updates they submit. By submitting information, you confirm that it is accurate and that you are authorised to provide it.
legal.termsIPBody: The SJK(T) Connect platform, its design, and original content are the property of Tamil Foundation Malaysia. School data from the Ministry of Education is public information. You may reference and link to our content with attribution.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: SJK(T) Connect is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Tamil Foundation Malaysia shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this platform.
legal.cookiesIntroBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.
legal.cookiesEssentialBody: We use essential cookies for: language preference (remembering your chosen language — English, Bahasa Malaysia, or Tamil), session management (maintaining your login state if you have claimed a school page), and security (protecting against cross-site request forgery). These cookies are necessary for the platform to function and cannot be disabled.
legal.cookiesThirdPartyBody: Google Maps: When viewing maps on our platform, Google may set cookies to provide mapping functionality. These are governed by Google's privacy policy. We do not use any advertising or tracking cookies.
legal.cookiesManageBody: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of the platform. For more information about managing cookies, visit your browser's help documentation.

contact.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at info@tamilfoundation.org.
contact.responseTime: We aim to respond within 2-3 working days.

mapFilters.assistanceInfo: Schools are coloured by their funding type: government-aided (SBK) or fully government (SK).
mapFilters.locationInfo: Schools are coloured by their location: urban (Bandar) or rural (Luar Bandar).
mapFilters.programmesInfo: Schools are coloured by whether they offer preschool, special needs, both, or neither.
mapFilters.enrolmentInfo: Schools at or below the threshold are highlighted in red.

aboutTamilSchools.title: Tamil Schools in Malaysia — How Many, Where, Statistics | SJK(T) Connect
aboutTamilSchools.heading: Tamil Schools in Malaysia
aboutTamilSchools.intro: Malaysia has 528 Tamil primary schools (SJK(T)) educating over 69,000 students across 11 states. This page answers the most common questions about Tamil-medium primary education in Malaysia.
aboutTamilSchools.howManyHeading: How many Tamil schools are there in Malaysia?
aboutTamilSchools.howManyBody: There are {totalSchools} Tamil primary schools (Sekolah Jenis Kebangsaan Tamil, abbreviated SJK(T)) operating in Malaysia. They serve {totalStudents} students with {totalTeachers} teachers across {states} states. {totalPreschool} children attend SJK(T) preschool programmes; {totalSpecialNeeds} are enrolled in special education. {schoolsUnder30} schools have fewer than 30 students.
aboutTamilSchools.byStateHeading: How are Tamil schools distributed across states?
aboutTamilSchools.byStateIntro: Tamil schools follow the historical settlement pattern of the Indian Malaysian community, concentrated in Selangor, Perak, Johor, and Negeri Sembilan.
aboutTamilSchools.whatIsBody: SJK(T) — Sekolah Jenis Kebangsaan (Tamil) — is a Malaysian government-funded national-type primary school where Tamil is the medium of instruction for most subjects, alongside Bahasa Malaysia and English. Students complete six years of primary education (Standard 1 to Standard 6) before transitioning to secondary school in Bahasa Malaysia. SJK(T)s are part of Malaysia's national education system and follow the national curriculum (KSSR).
aboutTamilSchools.ctaBody: Search for any specific Tamil school by name, state, or constituency on the SJK(T) Connect homepage. View enrolment data, leadership, parliamentary mentions, news, and ways to support each school.
aboutTamilSchools.loadError: Unable to load live statistics. Please refresh.
